Network activity shows only one DNS lookup to i2.tietuku.com with no resolved IPs and no HTTP conversations recorded. This suggests the C2 communication might be delayed, encrypted, or the sandbox env

Registry changes show no persistence keys, which is interesting given the 'spreader' tag and the RASMAN service opened. The persistence might be achieved through other means (e.g., scheduled tasks, se
